prompt: Ultra-realistic editorial overhead food photography of an artisan bread assortment displayed on a large rustic wooden table. Visible: a dark rye sourdough loaf with deep scoring, a lighter spelt Vollkornbrot with seeds, a Zopf braided bread with golden glaze, a cluster of Laugenbretzeln with coarse salt, and several assorted Brötchen. Each bread has distinct, authentic texture — porous crumb visible where sliced, floured crusts, natural imperfections. Whole wheat flour dusting on the wood surface, a small sprigs of rosemary and some scattered grain. Warm but controlled natural side light, 35mm lens, f/4.5, ISO 160. High contrast between dark and light breads. Completely authentic, no artificial symmetry, organic arrangement. Swiss-German artisan bakery editorial aesthetic.
negative_prompt: perfectly symmetrical, plastic, CGI, cartoon, studio light, artificial, generic stock, overexposed, oversaturated, too clean, too perfect, no texture, synthetic, watermark, modern packaging

settings.lighting: natural warm side window light, gentle shadows
settings.depth_of_field: medium, most breads sharp, edges soft
settings.quality: ultra high detail, visible crumb texture, flour particles
